title: turnera sidoides subsp. holosericea
intro: Turnera sidoides subsp. holosericea, also known as Turnera holosericea, is a plant species belonging to the family Passifloraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Turnera holosericea include the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, as well as its potential anti-anxiety and stress-relieving effects. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
